title: Ghost Wood
description:
This Mod gives the Player the possibility to convert Wood into ghost wood.
Ghost Wood is green and transparent.
You can craft an Ghost-Wand with a bone and a stick andit´s durabilty is one use.
For Creative there is also an Creative-Ghost-Wand.
body:
This Mod contains:

A Wand to convert Wooden Blocks to Ghost Blocks
The Creative Version has no limitations and can be used infinte.
The Survival one can convert one Block and can only be used 20 times before breaking.
Its crafted with an stick and an bone.

There are:
Planks, Doors, Wood, Stripped Wood, Logs, Stripped Logs, Bells, Slabs, Stairs, Trap Doors, Fence, Fence Gates, Buttons

The Blocks are Ghostly green and trancelucent, but working like normal Wood.
